label: Overview
description: A design-system-neutral framework for independently developed App Modules.

label: Motivation
description: How bounded applications limit compounding mistakes in LLM-assisted development.

label: Architecture
description: One durable framework, replaceable presentation, and independently owned App Modules.

label: Contracts
description: Manifests, activation, registries, and package-by-feature boundaries.

label: Presentation seam
description: The feature-level contract between App Foundry and an independent UI kit.

label: Generators
description: Neutral generator mechanics with presentation-specific recipes layered above them.

label: Annotated source
description: Commentary and repository source rendered together at the public framework boundary.

label: Host lifecycle
description: Manifest registration, activation, navigation, disposal, and workspace aggregation.

label: Shell SDK
description: Commands, context, events, preferences, and disposable collaboration state.

label: Access control
description: Capability declarations, grants, requirements, and access decisions.

label: Workspace entities
description: Cross-module entity kinds, sources, aggregation, mentions, and references.

label: Import maps
description: Import-map generation and installation for independently shipped modules.

label: Presentation adapter
description: The feature-level frame, palette, preferences, outlet, and error-boundary seam.

label: Frame model
description: Headless navigation and shell state consumed by a presentation adapter.

label: Command palette model
description: Presentation-neutral command search, selection, and execution state.

label: Preferences model
description: Headless grouped settings and resolved-source inspection.

label: App runtime
description: React bindings for activating, rendering, and disposing App Modules.

label: HTTP helpers
description: Explicit routes, JSON responses, request parsing, health, and asset fallbacks.

label: Access guard
description: Request-bound capability checks and denied-response behavior.

label: D1 helpers
description: Binding guards, prepared statements, and small batch helpers.

label: Short links
description: Unbiased short-code generation and redirect-route composition.

label: Generator engine
description: Naming, path containment, overwrite protection, dry runs, and deterministic writes.
